title: Lean Manufacturing
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying lean manufacturing requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: Lean Manufacturing helps quality, operations, and process teams translate lean manufacturing into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers The objective of this program is to enable the participants to, Distinguish the characteristics from old management to lean management, and Identify the characteristics of a pull and push system so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: The objective of this program is to enable the participants to
Distinguish the characteristics from old management to lean management
Identify the characteristics of a pull and push system
Management of value creation elements in the business process

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
